headline: Enterprise's $5.3B Expansion Pipeline Supports Long-Term Outlook
summary: EPD's $5.3B project pipeline and rising global LPG demand position the partnership to expand hydrocarbon transport and export capacity.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Enbridge, Kinder Morgan and The Williams Companies
summary: Enbridge, Kinder Morgan and Williams Companies are benefiting from stable cash flows, LNG demand and rising energy needs from data centers.
